title: It's All Food
description: Turn your entire world into edible... and eat it away!
body:
Ever wanted to eat away at your world? Well now you can!

### Introducing It's All Food!

With MC Snapshot 24w12a, every single item in the game could be turned into food.

So I spent 2 days doing JUST THAT!

This may be a joke, but I will be updating and maintaining this pack.

### Incompatability Warning

This pack is NOT compatible with the following:

1. Minecraft 1.21 Experiments
2. Bundle Experiment
3. Other datapacks that modify vanilla loot tables & recipies
